infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Yaver uses your microphone for voice input — send tasks by speaking instead of typing.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Yaver uses speech recognition to transcribe your voice into task descriptions.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Yaver uses your camera for photos and running apps that need camera access.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Yaver uses your photo library to attach screenshots and images to coding tasks.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Yaver provides location access to apps you run for testing.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Yaver provides location access to apps you run for testing.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Yaver provides Bluetooth access to apps you run for testing.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Yaver provides Bluetooth access to apps you run for testing.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Yaver provides motion sensor access to apps you run for testing.

plugins.photosPermission: Yaver needs photo access to attach images to tasks.
plugins.cameraPermission: Yaver needs camera access to take photos for tasks.
Yaver provides camera access to apps you run for testing.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Yaver provides location access to apps you run for testing.
